scripts.test:integration: cd tests && npx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:integration:up: cd tests && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build -d
scripts.test:integration:run: cd tests && npx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:integration:down: cd tests && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans
scripts.test:integration:coverage: cd tests && npx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --coverage
